rationale: External CAPL/MeltpoolGAN routes motivate ordered path-contact/reheat graphs, but Phase 114 already closed simple G-code strategy summaries; the next branch must be finer-grained and baseline-first.
MAM-PhyGNN-style inductive bias is promising, but mechanism design must wait until a topology/source gate beats strong baselines and shuffled controls.
Neural operators and microstructure GNNs are externally credible, but current project evidence lacks a stable dense/operator target or physically registered microstructure gap.
